text: Excuse me sir. Sir, is this your yacht? Yeah. What did you do to be able to buy a yacht? You're in the car business. You're in the car business? And how long have you been in the business? A lot of time. How much was this boat? You want me to take you to New Little Bad News? The Bad News first? The Bad News is 120 million euros. 100 million dollars? 120 million. Could I interview you for one minute? I go all over the world interviewing billionaires and the wealthiest people to help the younger generation. The younger generation? Yeah. Want to go on? Is that cool? How much are you worth today? Big money. Big money. Big money. Have you ever been fucked over in business? Oh yeah, plenty of times that you don't pay backs of a bitch. Yeah. What was your turning point to financial freedom? What made you want to go out there and become such a successful entrepreneur? So, I learned something in my life. I don't know what the word no means. You don't take no for an answer? No. Why not? The people that doubted me, you know, I look at them, I say, you should have never not believed what I can do because here you are, you're out looking to get in and I won't let you in. Have you ever been broke before? No. Never been broke before? No, I don't want to be either. But what keeps so many people broken today's world? But what happens with some people? They make their thoughts bigger than their ass. Write that word down. No, they make their thoughts bigger than their ass. In other words, you know, they do things bigger than they should. How old are you now? 78. 78? You look amazing for 78. Are you still running companies today? Oh yeah, I work every day. Are you serious? What's keeping you so motivated? Is it just the love and the passion you have? I just feel I'm too young to retire you and a lot of people think I'm crazy. I just want to keep going. I'm still buying companies today. You're still buying companies today? Yeah, I now want to go where I had a guy up here and I was buying one of his companies. What type of company? Another car dealership. As a multiple nine figure entrepreneur, what's the best financial advice you could give to the younger generation? I will tell you, a lot of people hoard their money. What I mean by that is money sitting in a bank don't make your money. You know, in the early days, we used to get loan books. They looked like chance books and I had so many loans out and I've made sure we paid them all back. And then I started saying, I'm not going to get no more loans. I'm going to try and do everything with my money. And that's what I did. I wanted to be successful. I want to be the best at what I do. Do you believe in God? I do. How did you know God was real? Look, I'm looking at myself today. I used to think I could fly without wings, but I never tried that one. So you had someone there guiding you all along? Yes. You got amazing advice there. Thank you so much for your time. Could I get your contact? Yeah. Do you want to come in for a second? Yeah, for sure. Come on guys.
